subparts.text: Explain how Fog Computing supports real-time data processing applications and how it differs from traditional cloud computing.
According to NIST, what are the essential characteristics of cloud computing?
Differentiate between resource virtualization and server virtualization using suitable real-world example.
How does cloud-optimized storage improve performance, scalability, and cost-efficiency in a cloud-based infrastructure?
An enterprise is transitioning from a traditional IT model to a cloud-based SPI framework. Analyze the key differences between these two models and the potential advantages of SPI.
A business needs to decide on a cloud deployment strategy. Discuss the various cloud deployment models and the factors influencing their selection.
Explain how cloud computing supports green IT initiatives and contributes to energy efficiency with real world example.
Discuss the key components of storage network architecture and their role in efficient data handling.
Discuss the role of Microsoft Hyper-V in server virtualization and its impact on enterprise computing.
What is network virtualization? Explain its types and how it enhances network performance in cloud environments.
